subcodes.first_line: O My Leaf! I bear witness that thou hast attained unto My days and turned toward My horizon, and hast quaffed the wine of revelation from the hand of My bounty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ورقتی اشهد انک فزت بایامی و الاقبال الی افقی و شربت رحیق الوحی من ید عطائی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for praise and gratitude, @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @Shrines and Holy places, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity
